title: Question: lxt2_config.h problem.
body:
--- Author Name: **HyungKi Jeong** Original Redmine Message: 2670 from https://www.veripool.org --- In MINGW64+MSYS2 system, there is no "alloca.h" header file.
And I have got an error with this.
Some codes on the lxt2_config.h
``` /* Define to 1 if you have and it should be used (not on Ultrix). */ #define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1 ``` And wavealloca.h header file. ``` #ifdef HAVE_ALLOCA_H #include ...... ``` Maybe it should be modified as shown below.
``` "lxt2_config.h" #ifndef HAVE_ALLOCA_H #define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1 #endif "wavealloca.h" #if HAVE_ALLOCA_H #include ...... ```
code_blocks:
/* Define to 1 if you have <alloca.h> and it should be used (not on Ultrix). */
#define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1

#ifdef HAVE_ALLOCA_H
#include <alloca.h>
......

"lxt2_config.h"
#ifndef HAVE_ALLOCA_H 
#define HAVE_ALLOCA_H 1
#endif

"wavealloca.h"
#if HAVE_ALLOCA_H
#include <alloca.h>
......
